sync.description: List of sync groups. Each group defines a source, target, and globs.

anyOf.description: A detailed glob entry with optional per-glob permissions and owner overrides

owner.description: Optional owner override for this glob (user:group)

permissions.description: Optional octal permission override for this glob

globs.description: Glob patterns defining which files to sync. Each entry is either a plain glob string or an object with per-glob overrides.

owner.description: Default owner (user:group) applied to synced files

permissions.description: Default permissions as an octal string (e.g. "644", "755")

source.description: Path to the source directory (files are read from here)

target.description: Path to the target directory (files are written here)
